name: Shenzhen Zhongzhuang Construction Group Co.,Ltd
summary: Shenzhen Zhongzhuang Construction Group Co.,Ltd, together with its subsidiaries, provides decoration services in China. It offers architectural decoration services for office spaces, hotels, public venues, rail transit projects, residential projects, commercial centers, and other projects. The company also engages in the landscaping business; construction of municipal housing projects; and provision of consulting design, installation and debugging, and operation training system solutions for grid-connected photovoltaic power plants, and hybrid and independent photovoltaic power plants. In addition, it engages in managing properties, such as offices, residential properties, shopping malls, hotels, apartments, and factories. Shenzhen Zhongzhuang Construction Group Co.,Ltd was founded in 1994 and is based in Shenzhen, China.
